headlines.title: Core inflation hit an annual rate of 3.3% in April, as expected, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
headlines.summary: The PCE price index for April was expected to show an annual inflation rate of 3.8% for all items and 3.3% for core.

headlines.title: Oil prices pull back on report U.S.-Iran agreement to extend ceasefire awaits Trump approval
headlines.summary: Oil prices pulled back Thursday, erasing earlier gains on a report that U.S. and Iranian negotiators reached an agreement to extend ceasefire.

headlines.title: New York passes Mamdani's pied-a-terre tax. Here's who pays and how much
headlines.summary: Citadel CEO Ken Griffin became the face of the tax after New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani posted a video in front of Griffin's penthouse apartment.

headlines.title: U.S. sanctions Iran's Hormuz Strait authority, condemns ballistic missile launch at Kuwait
headlines.summary: The latest military and economic actions come as President Trump insists he feels no pressure to make a deal with Iran before November's midterm elections.

headlines.title: Airlines, hotels warn against Trump admin threat to international flights to 'sanctuary cities'
headlines.summary: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin said the Trump administration is considering pulling international flight processing in "sanctuary cities."

headlines.title: Ro Khanna is taking his economic message on the road. Will it lead to the White House?
headlines.summary: Rep. Ro Khanna wasn't in the Rust Belt to campaign. But he could be soon.

headlines.title: Unusual Machines and other drone stocks surge on report Pentagon considering stakes in the industry
headlines.summary: Drone stocks surged Thursday on a report the Trump administration is in talks to fund several firms, including one in which Donald Trump Jr. is a shareholder.

headlines.title: Gaming association says states have lost $1 billion in tax revenue due to prediction markets
headlines.summary: Bill Miller, American Gaming Association president and CEO, added that prediction market platforms in his view amount to "backdoor sports betting."

headlines.title: Rally in chip stocks becomes the most hated in history. Here's the data

headlines.title: Google employee charged with $1M Polymarket insider trading bet on search term

headlines.title: New bull market in software stocks hinges on this report
headlines.summary: Options traders are convinced the "SAAS-pocalypse" is over. Whether that's true will likely depend on the market's reaction to one earnings report Wednesday.

headlines.title: A battle is brewing in the gold pits. Here are the winners and losers
headlines.summary: Options volumes leaned bullish in both the SPDR Gold ETF (GLD) and VanEck Gold Miners ETF (GDX) on Tuesday.

headlines.title: ‘There is zero transparency’: My friend’s sister controls their mother’s estate. How can we stop her from stealing?
headlines.summary: “The sister claims she does not have to explain herself to anyone.”

headlines.title: My friend wants me to sell her stuff at my garage sale. Should I take a cut of her profit?
headlines.summary: “I should get some money for my labor. But it feels a little icky to me.”

headlines.title: Dollar Tree’s sales top forecasts as fewer people are shopping but they’re spending more
headlines.summary: The stock is surging toward its best day in four years after the discount retailer’s full-year profit outlook was raised.

headlines.title: Houston Rockets owner is placing an $18 billion bet on Las Vegas by buying Caesars
headlines.summary: The holding company of Tilman Fertitta, who owns the NBA’s Houston Rockets and Golden Nugget casinos, is buying Caesars Entertainment in a deal valued at nearly $18 billion.

headlines.title: More Americans are raiding their emergency savings just to fill up their gas tanks
headlines.summary: Most people think of emergencies as job loss or a hospital bill. For many today, it’s soaring energy costs.

headlines.title: Here’s the real story behind the record drop in America’s oil reserves
headlines.summary: Stocks in the nation’s Strategic Petroleum Reserve are near their lowest in more than 40 years — but it may not matter
